'''鈭歫-n-zh-ch''' ('''kajanzhechoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jarovize|jarovize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-zh-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jarovize|jarovize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歫-n-zh-ch
|-
! Lemma
| kajanzhechoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijanzhechoko|thijanzhechoko]] || [[word:jijanzhechoko|jijanzhechoko]] || [[word:shijanzhechoko|shijanzhechoko]] || [[word:kijanzhechoko|kijanzhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujanzhechoko|thuthujanzhechoko]] || [[word:jujujanzhechoko|jujujanzhechoko]] || [[word:shushujanzhechoko|shushujanzhechoko]] || [[word:kukujanzhechoko|kukujanzhechoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujanzhechoko|thujanzhechoko]] || [[word:jujanzhechoko|jujanzhechoko]] || [[word:shujanzhechoko|shujanzhechoko]] || [[word:kujanzhechoko|kujanzhechoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojanzhechoko|thojanzhechoko]] || [[word:jojanzhechoko|jojanzhechoko]] || [[word:shojanzhechoko|shojanzhechoko]] || [[word:kojanzhechoko|kojanzhechoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙janzhechoko|th忙janzhechoko]] || [[word:j忙janzhechoko|j忙janzhechoko]] || [[word:sh忙janzhechoko|sh忙janzhechoko]] || [[word:k忙janzhechoko|k忙janzhechoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajanzhechoko|thajanzhechoko]] || [[word:jajanzhechoko|jajanzhechoko]] || [[word:shajanzhechoko|shajanzhechoko]] || [[word:kajanzhechoko|kajanzhechoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
